Mtn To Reopen Disco
Off Calendar Apr-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted.
DEFENDANT CAROLYN GILLESPIE BASS' Motion To Reopen Discovery.
No opposition filed by Plaintiff. Motion granted in part; denied in part. The motion to completely reopen discovery is denied due to the close proximity of the trial set for June 4, 2012. However, the Court grants the motion to allow the moving party to serve subpoenas on Plaintiff's medical providers. Order Provided with Courtesy copies signed as modified by the court. Pro Tem Judge: David McDonald, not reported.
